name: 13_high_count_resets_fully
description: Count is 5 in, condition fails. Must reset to 0 (NOT 4 -- full reset, not decrement).
derivation: Guard passes. Magnitude: 0.5 <= -1.10 is FALSE. MC: 90.0 < 60.0 is FALSE. Reset branch fires unconditional `bot_state[...]['below_stop_count'] = 0`. new_count = 0 (NOT 4 -- this is a full reset, never a decrement). Catches an impl that used `max(0, count-1)` or `count - 1`.
